sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59" key="a)baska/nistos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀβασκάνιστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n59.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">free from malice,</tr_> perh. to be read for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀβασάν-,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.755d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
